Description.Name: Endo Steel A (C)
Description.Details: The Clans never lost the technology for manufacturing Endo Steel internal structure, and kept refining it while in their self imposed exile from the inner sphere. As a result, Clantech endosteel internals are much more compact and efficient, a full chassis of clan manufacture endo steel is thus 5 Endo Steel A (C) for 5.0 tons
